_note: Maintained by hand in the GitHub editor. Each entry under 'reports' is a scheduled USDA report. Fill estimate_low / estimate_avg / estimate_high (and optionally implied_odds and positioning) from the pre-report trade survey once it publishes (usually 1-2 days before the release). When the range is filled, the page shows the range bar + surprise thresholds automatically. Leave estimate_* as null until you have real survey numbers - do not invent them. After a report releases, move it into wpi-history.json with the actual print.

reports.expectation: First WASDE to fold in the June 30 Acreage survey - typically the report's first real new-crop reset of the summer.
The August report carries the first field-survey-based corn and soybean yield estimates - one of the highest-impact supply reports of the year.
